content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — WallpaperGridView.swift:1-8 imports HomeKit and instantiates HMHomeManager but the view only lists wallpaper categories with no home-automation UI or accessory management.
Pierre: Apple flags HomeKit imports that don't provide genuine home-automation functionality, since HMHomeManager triggers a "Local Network"/HomeKit usage prompt to users for no visible benefit here — a wallpaper app has no plausible reason to request home data access. Either remove the unused HomeKit import/manager instantiation, or if it's a leftover from a template, delete it before submission to avoid reviewer questions about undisclosed functionality.
